title: Camoufox Stealth Browser Backend (v0.7.0+)
summary: v0.7.0 shipped Camoufox as the stealth browser backend — anti-fingerprint, auto-installs via `hermes tools`. Source 1sd1wji (98/13).
key_concepts: shipped alongside credential pools in v0.7.0
gotchas: u/cribbageSTARSHIP (+2): v0.7.0 era — 'gateway didn't start on boot.' Verify gateway autostart works after upgrade to/past 0.7.x
full_text:
Source: r/hermesagent post 1sd1wji (98 score, 13 comments). Two big v0.7.0 features shipped together: Camoufox stealth browser + credential pools (separate section).

Camoufox repo: github.com/daijro/camoufox
Auto-installs via `hermes tools`.

Known issue at v0.7 era: gateway didn't start on boot (u/cribbageSTARSHIP). Worth verifying autostart after upgrade.
